originalTitle: The biggest risk to your retirement isn’t a market crash — it’s a crisis you probably haven’t planned for
summary: Health-related financial risks are the No. 1 threat to retirement security.
content: Health-related financial risks are the No. 1 threat to retirement security.
chineseTitle: 您退休面临的最大风险不是市场崩盘，而是一场您可能没有计划到的危机
chineseSummary: 与健康相关的金融风险是退休保障的第一大威胁。
chineseContent: 与健康相关的金融风险是退休保障的第一大威胁。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
